title: 3 Facts About Honeybees

segments.text: Honeybees communicate through a dance known as the waggle dance.
A single honeybee can visit up to 2,000 flowers in a day.
They play a crucial role in pollinating one-third of the food we eat.
They live in colonies that can consist of tens of thousands of bees.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Honeybees are fascinating creatures with amazing skills. Follow for daily facts!
